mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN tb_manager AS ${regManangerAlias} ON ( SUBSTRING_INDEX ( ${auditTable} . reg_id, '|', 1 ) = 'BO' AND ${regManangerAlias} . manager_key = CAST ( SUBSTRING_INDEX ( ${auditTable} . reg_id, '|', - 1 ) AS UNSIGNED ) ) LEFT JOIN tb_manager AS ${modManangerAlias} ON ( SUBSTRING_INDEX ( ${auditTable} . mod_id, '|', 1 ) = 'BO' AND ${modManangerAlias} . manager_key = CAST ( SUBSTRING_INDEX ( ${auditTable} . mod_id, '|', - 1 ) AS UNSIGNED ) ) LEFT JOIN tb_member AS ${regMemberAlias} ON ( SUBSTRING_INDEX ( ${auditTable} . reg_id, '|', 1 ) = 'FO' AND ${regMemberAlias} . member_key = CAST ( SUBSTRING_INDEX ( ${auditTable} . reg_id, '|', - 1 ) AS UNSIGNED ) ) LEFT JOIN tb_member_info_log AS ${regMemberInfoAlias} ON ${regMemberInfoAlias} . log_key = ${regMemberAlias} . status_lkey LEFT JOIN tb_member AS ${modMemberAlias} ON ( SUBSTRING_INDEX ( ${auditTable} . mod_id, '|', 1 ) = 'FO' AND ${modMemberAlias} . member_key = CAST ( SUBSTRING_INDEX ( ${auditTable} . mod_id, '|', - 1 ) AS UNSIGNED ) ) LEFT JOIN tb_member_info_log AS ${modMemberInfoAlias} ON ${modMemberInfoAlias} . log_key = ${modMemberAlias} . status_lkey
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_multilingual WHERE target_key = ${targetKeyField} AND target_ckey = ${targetTypeKey} AND desc_ckey = ${descriptionTypeKey} AND short_cont = ${content} )
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_multilingual WHERE target_key = ${targetKeyField} AND target_ckey = ${targetTypeKey} AND desc_ckey = ${descriptionTypeKey} AND short_cont LIKE CONCAT ( ${content}, '%' ) )

EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_multilingual WHERE target_key = ${targetKeyField} AND target_ckey = ${targetTypeKey} AND desc_ckey = ${descriptionTypeKey} AND short_cont LIKE CONCAT ( '%', ${content}, '%' ) )
